title: Learning reflection
subtitle: Say what is easy, hard, and useful.
overview: Use me resulta, me cuesta, he mejorado.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Remembering verbs is hard for me.

items.es: Me resulta útil escuchar cada frase varias veces.
items.en: Listening to each sentence several times is useful for me.

items.es: Me cuesta recordar las formas del pasado.
items.en: Remembering the past forms is hard for me.
I still need to practice real conversations.

items.es: Creo que estoy aprendiendo de una forma más natural.
items.en: I think I am learning in a more natural way.
